hypothesis: For scientific tasks where the mean minimum cosine distance between task and available tool embeddings exceeds 0.6, automatically synthesizing and adding an intermediate "hypothesis-generator" tool that reduces that mean-min distance by at least 0.1 will increase pass@5 of domain-weak base models (e.g., GPT-4o) by at least 30 percentage points relative to the same agent configuration without the synthesized tool, irrespective of whether a ReAct or tool-calling framework is used.
